creator: armin@frozen-zone.org
text:
Patch includes update for:
lang/librep -> 0.91.0
- removed gettext dependency (was not able to find a hint in the tarball why gettext should be required)
- changed MASTER_SITES (looks like SF is no longer up to date)
x11-toolkits/rep-gtk2 -> 0.90.4
- changed MASTER_SITES (looks like SF is no longer up to date)
x11-wm/sawfish -> 1.7.1
- added option for kde4 session files (including a dependency on kde4 runtime)
- added support for WITHOUT_NLS
- changed MASTER_SITES (looks like SF is no longer up to date)

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
